title: pistacia khinjuk var. macrocarpa
intro: Pistacia khinjuk var. macrocarpa, also known as the 'Khorasan pistachio' or 'Pistachio tree', is a deciduous tree species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pistacia khinjuk var. macrocarpa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make various remedies, such as salves, ointments, and capsules.
